_comment: Canonical example for the FRONTEND_ARCHITECTURE block emitted by the solution-architect inside outputs/phase-2-architecture.md. The JSON is the structured INDEX downstream consumers (Phase 5b react-implementer / nextjs-implementer — via the task-planner's Architecture context) extract via `node {plugin_dir}/scripts/extract-block.js {this-file} FRONTEND_ARCHITECTURE`. Three arrays enumerate what the implementer must build: `components[]` (every page/component/hook/provider to create or modify), `routes[]` (URL routes added/modified/removed), `api_integration[]` (service functions in the frontend's api layer that bind to backend endpoints from API_DESIGN). The prose under the JSON carries state-management strategy (query keys, contexts, form approach), i18n key additions, and styling notes — material that doesn't fit a uniform schema. Field reference and consumer list live in block-schemas.md. When the feature has no frontend involvement (`frontend_required: false` in AFFECTED_SERVICES), emit `{"components": [], "routes": [], "api_integration": []}` rather than omitting the block — the planner's skip-decision reads `components.length`. Strip the _comment field from real output.

components.name: BulkUploadPage
components.purpose: Top-level page hosting the bulk upload flow — wraps the queue + dropzone + per-file status

components.name: UploadDropzone
components.purpose: Multi-file drag-and-drop + file picker — emits selected files to the queue

components.name: UploadQueue
components.purpose: Renders the per-file upload list with progress and final status

components.name: FileListItem
components.purpose: Single-file row — name, size, progress bar, success/failure badge

components.name: useBulkUpload
components.purpose: Coordinates per-file mutations; exposes start, progress, and result-set state
